aesthetic: Moonlight — invisible design, micron-level precision, soft studio lighting
principles: Invisible design: observer remembers content, not style
One focal point per page — never two competing elements
Blue #0071e3 only for CTA/links, ≤5 times per deck
Product copy: one sentence per value, no adjective stacking
promptGuide: Apply the Moonlight aesthetic: Plus Jakarta Sans weight 600 display (letter-spacing -0.02em), weight 400 body (line-height 1.6), strict font-size ratio 1/0.67/0.5/0.42, bg #fbfbfd (not pure white), text #1d1d1f (not pure black), blue #0071e3 for CTA only (≤5 per deck), 1px border #d2d2d7 + 2px blur shadow rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 16px border-radius, symmetric whitespace ≥50%, one focal point per page, product tone: confident but understated, one adjective max per sentence.
